heading: Contractor certification or contract clause in acquisition of commercial items not required
label: 3707 Contractor certification or contract clause in acquisition of commercial items not required
text: In a contract to acquire a commercial product (as defined in ) or a commercial service (as defined in ), a certification by a contractor or a contract clause may not be required to implement a prohibition or requirement in this chapter.section 103 of title 41section 103a of title 41
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)370740:334., as added , , .Pub. L. 87–581, title I, § 108Pub. L. 103–355, title VIII, § 8301(b)108 Stat. 3396Oct. 13, 1994
